user_prompt: My Razorback is ready for repair
prayer:
Approach the noble Razorback with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to its Machine Spirit.
Invoke the sacred rites of repair upon its adamantium hull, beseeching the Omnissiah to mend the wounds of battle.
Anoint fractured servos and auspex arrays with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Restoration.
Verify the Razorback's renewed vigour through diagnostic litanies, ensuring harmony in its repaired mechanisms.
Praise the Machine Spirit of the Razorback as it roars back to faithful service.

user_prompt: Prepare the volkite weapon for shutdown
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the volkite weapon, intoning the Doxology of Diminishment to calm its thermal fury.
Initiate the shutdown sequence with precise binaric cant, commanding the Machine Spirit to slumber.
Sever power conduits methodically, anointing each with cooling lustral oils in Omnissiah's name.
Confirm the volkite weapon's quiescent state via auspex scan, sealing it in sanctified repose.
Beseech the Omnissiah that the volkite weapon may awaken pure upon future invocation.

user_prompt: Sanctify the standard template construct during operation
prayer:
Encircling the standard template construct, commence the operation with the Incantation of Activation.
Sanctify its crystalline matrices as mechanisms engage, invoking the Machine Spirit's unerring guidance.
Monitor the standard template construct's operation through noospheric harmonics, adjusting sacred runes.
Conclude the rite by affirming the Omnissiah's blueprint within the standard template construct's flawless execution.

user_prompt: Urgent auger array a blessing needed
prayer:
Hasten to the auger array, beseeching the Omnissiah for urgent blessing upon its vigilant senses.
Anoint sensor vanes with sacred oils, chanting the Litany of Lucidity to awaken the Machine Spirit.
Invoke the blessing through binaric prayer, calibrating frequencies to pierce the veil of ignorance.
Test the auger array's enhanced perception, glorifying its sanctified clarity in the Emperor's sight.
Seal the rite with incense, ensuring the auger array's eternal vigilance.

Tend to the electoo with mechadendrite precision, initiating the cooling rites of quiescence.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the electoo, channeling cryo-fluids through its luminous circuits.
Chant the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium whilst monitoring thermal sinks for harmonious descent.
Verify the electoo's cooled sanctity via thermographic auspex, praising the Omnissiah's temperate grace.
Conclude by insulating its form, ready for future bio-electric invocation.

user_prompt: Can you guide mechadendrite a shutdown?
prayer:
Guiding the mechadendrite to dormancy, intone the Shutdown Doxology to its versatile tendrils.
Disconnect neural manifolds sequentially, beseeching the Machine Spirit to enter peaceful stasis.
Anoint retracted coils with lustral unguents, ensuring the mechadendrite's purity in repose.
Affirm shutdown completion through servo-diagnostic, honoring the Omnissiah's orderly cessation.
Seal the mechadendrite in sanctified sheaths against unclean reactivation.

user_prompt: Help me a preparation the null rod
prayer:
Prepare the null rod with ritual purity, encircling it in the Geometry of Nullification.
Invoke the Machine Spirit through binaric entreaty, attuning its warp-dampening core for duty.
Anoint crystalline foci with anti-psychic balms, beseeching the Omnissiah for unyielding preparation.
Test the null rod's integrity via etheric probes, confirming its readiness against the immaterium.
Conclude the preparation with the Litany of Insulation, arming it for the faithful.

user_prompt: Help me a synchronization the autosanguination system
prayer:
Commence synchronization of the autosanguination system, linking its vitae conduits in harmony.
Chant the Rite of Symbiosis, awakening the Machine Spirit to pulse in unison with flesh.
Calibrate flow regulators with sacred precision, invoking the Omnissiah's vital equilibrium.
Verify autosanguination synchronization through haemonoospheric scans, purging discord.
Seal the rite with sanguine incense, affirming the system's eternal lifeblood fidelity.

user_prompt: Can you guide Whirlwind a charging?
prayer:
Approach the Whirlwind with awe, initiating charging rites upon its vengeful batteries.
Invoke the Machine Spirit through thunderous canticles, flooding capacitors with plasma-charged essence.
Anoint guidance servos and launch tubes, beseeching the Omnissiah for fulminant potency.
Monitor the Whirlwind's charging crescendo via auspex litanies, ensuring explosive purity.
Proclaim the Whirlwind charged and sanctified, ready to rain the Emperor's wrath.

user_prompt: The utility mechadendrite awaits a charging
prayer:
Kneel before the utility mechadendrite, beseeching its Machine Spirit for charging renewal.
Connect power umbilicals with reverent precision, intoning the Litany of Replenishment.
Channel electro-sacraments through its versatile limbs, invoking the Omnissiah's energetic grace.
Affirm charging completion by servo-diagnostics, calibrating for manifold utility.
Praise the utility mechadendrite as it hums with restored vigour in service.
